---
title: "Network Science & Complex Adaptive Systems"
subtitle: "Networks, agents, and dynamics in biological, social, and cyber systems"
description: "BioMIND research on network science, complex adaptive systems, agent-based modeling, information diffusion, and computational social science."
---

## Overview

This area studies **biological, social, cyber, organizational, and technological systems as complex adaptive systems**. BioMIND uses network science, agent-based modeling, information theory, social simulation, and AI to model emergence, adaptation, diffusion, influence, and collective dynamics.

## Key themes

::: {.bm-grid .bm-grid-2}

::: {.bm-card}
### Complex adaptive systems
Emergence, adaptation, robustness, and modularity across biological and social systems.
:::

::: {.bm-card}
### Network science
Structure, dynamics, and inference on multilayer and temporal networks at scale.
:::

::: {.bm-card}
### Agent-based modeling
Simulation of heterogeneous agents and their interactions in social and biological systems.
:::

::: {.bm-card}
### Information diffusion
Cascades, narratives, and signal propagation in cyber-social systems.
:::

::: {.bm-card}
### Misinformation dynamics
Detection, characterization, and modeling of misinformation and influence operations.
:::

::: {.bm-card}
### Social and cyber systems
Coupled dynamics of humans, algorithms, and infrastructure.
:::

::: {.bm-card}
### Multi-agent systems
Coordination, debate, and division of labor among autonomous agents.
:::

::: {.bm-card}
### Innovation ecosystems
Network and complex-systems analysis of innovation, collaboration, and knowledge flows.
:::

::: {.bm-card}
### Computational social science
Data-driven and simulation-based study of human collective behavior.
:::

:::

## Current student projects

Current BioMIND student projects in this area include **graphon and graphlet models of sparse neural connectivity**, **information flow in neural networks**, and **network-science approaches to biological and neural systems**. See the [Students](../people/students.qmd) and [Publications](../publications/index.qmd) pages.

## Related faculty

- [Ivan I. Garibay](../people/faculty.qmd#ivan-i-garibay) — CASL
- [Ozlem Ozmen Garibay](../people/faculty.qmd#ozlem-ozmen-garibay) — Human-CAIR
- [Niloofar Yousefi](../people/faculty.qmd#niloofar-yousefi) — AI-AIR

## Representative publications

See the [Publications](../publications/index.qmd) page, under *Complex Systems, Networks, and Information Dynamics*.
